creator: hnokubi@yyy.or.jp
text:
I play NetHack on X11. When I died, NetHack ended with error.
	It left message 'missing rip.xpm', something like that.

Fix: Following patch to the top level Makefile fixes this problem.
	(I've got this information from win/X11/Install.X11)
How-To-Repeat: 
	play NetHack on X11 and die.
